content: VideoSkillOpt rollout run with web-video-presentation methodology.
Process topic6 via local WeChat HTML source and complete full presentation rollout.

cmd: materialize source to article.md from local HTML
obs: success; extracted readable Chinese article content and removed JS/CSS/UI noise

cmd: generate script.md + outline.md with default checkpoint choices
obs: success; script + outline generated; theme auto-selected to first suitable recommendation: midnight-press; mode default A
success; Vite React TS project generated with 5 chapters / 20 steps; local WeChat assets copied to public/assets with placeholders for missing media

cmd: run npm install, npm run extract-narrations, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build
obs: all passed; extracted 20 narration segments; build output in presentation/dist
blocked; jq missing in environment, audio synthesis skipped and recorded
